title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese reviews 9 Claude Code plugins that accelerate development, including Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic Skill Creator, and others. The plugins extend Claude with web scraping, model swapping, and cost monitoring capabilities.
